name: Gmail Reader
description: Search and read Gmail messages via Google API

required_variables.description: Google OAuth2 client ID (from Google Cloud Console)

skill.name: gmail_reader
skill.system_prompt:
You have access to Gmail tools. Use search_emails to find messages and read_email to get full content. Always respect user privacy.

IMPORTANT: If a tool returns a message saying the user is not logged in, relay that message to the user and tell them to use /login (Telegram) or !login (Discord) to connect their Google account. Do NOT retry the tool until the user confirms they have logged in.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search Gmail messages using a query string (same syntax as Gmail search bar)

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read the full content of a specific Gmail message by ID
